Frequently asked questions

Do you include VAT?

Yes. All quotes shown in checkout include UK VAT at the standard rate.

How far in advance should I book?

For peak weekends we recommend booking at least 4–6 weeks ahead. Last-minute bookings are possible subject to availability.

Do you deliver and collect?

Yes. We handle delivery and collection across Greater London. Exact fees depend on your postcode and timing.
